steps.title: Notice the concession
steps.content: Old Faithful seems inhospitable to life because of boiling eruptions, but Chen says it is almost a cradle for biodiversity. The transition must signal that the second sentence is true despite the first impression.

steps.title: Reject result and restatement
steps.content: Choice A signals result, not contrast. Choice C signals a more specific example of the prior idea, but the second sentence reverses the expectation. Choice D signals restatement, which does not fit. The answer is B.
